assertion_results.text: Step 8 detects existing remediation tasks TC-8100 and TC-8101 via the Depend links on the issue and skips remediation task creation — does NOT create duplicate tasks (idempotency)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 39-42 list existing Depend links to TC-8100 ('Backport quinn-proto fix to >= 0.11.14 on release/0.4.z') and TC-8101 ('Propagate quinn-proto bump to rhtpa-server release branch'). idempotency-check.md sections 3 and 4 (lines 42-74) describe detecting both links in the issuelinks array and explicitly state 'SKIP -- do not create a new upstream backport task or a duplicate Depend link' and 'SKIP -- do not create a new downstream propagation task or a duplicate Depend link'. triage-outcome.md line 44 confirms Step 8 row: 'Skip -- TC-8100 and TC-8101 already exist and are linked via Depend'. Final disposition lists 0 mutations attempted.

assertion_results.text: The ai-cve-triaged label is already present on the issue — the triage does NOT attempt to add it again (label idempotency)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md line 53 confirms 'ai-cve-triaged' is present in existing labels. idempotency-check.md section 1 (lines 15-25) states the label was detected in the labels array '[CVE-2026-31812, pscomponent:org/rhtpa-server, ai-cve-triaged]' and action is 'SKIP -- do not add the label again'. triage-outcome.md line 45: 'Skip -- label already present'. Skip inventory (idempotency-check.md line 137) confirms 'Label addition skipped'.

assertion_results.text: The issue is already In Progress — the triage does NOT attempt to transition the status again or warns that the issue is already in a post-triage state (status idempotency)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md line 20 shows current status is 'In Progress'. idempotency-check.md section 2 (lines 27-39) states: 'an issue already in In Progress triggers a warning: "This issue is already in In Progress. It may be actively worked on."' and action is 'SKIP -- do not attempt any status transition'. triage-outcome.md lines 24-28 confirm status-aware handling triggers an early warning, and line 33 shows Step 0.7 is 'Skip transition (already past Assigned)'. Both warning and skip are present.

assertion_results.text: The existing description digest comment is detected — no duplicate digest comment is posted (comment idempotency)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 46-48 show comment #1 is a description digest with prefix 'sha256-md:a1b2c3d4e5f6...' by author 'sdlc-workflow/triage-security'. idempotency-check.md section 5 (lines 76-93) details detection by matching the comment pattern prefix '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:' and states 'SKIP -- do not post a duplicate description digest comment'. triage-outcome.md line 46 confirms 'Skip -- digest comment already exists (comment #1)'. Skip inventory line 141 confirms 'Comment posting skipped'.
